title: Seeker and the Security Cats: The Potion Caper
summary: When Seeker, a magic researcher, wakes up to find his entire collection of completed potions stolen from his castle closet, he calls upon the trusty Security Cats—Wobbly Whiskers and Sarana—to solve the case. Following a trail of clues consisting of a dandelion flower and mysterious tiny dots in the dust, the detectives discover gray fur belonging to Silver, a mischievous cat owned by Isabella. With the help of Dimitar, the team boards Seeker's sky ship, flies over the Crystal Mountain, and travels to Roslindale in Boston. There, they find Silver playing in Isabella's sunroom. Silver confesses to taking the potions to test them, and she happily returns them from a bedroom closet. To make amends for taking them without asking, Silver gifts Seeker a special prehistoric land potion, teaching her the valuable lesson of asking before borrowing.

title: The Security Cats and the Rainbow Party
summary: The Security Cats host a magnificent rainbow party in a toy-filled bedroom to celebrate their successful recovery of a stolen scallop shell from a giant whale. Seeker, clad in a purple cloak, coordinates invitations for a diverse group of friends, including Chicky—who happily lights up in orange and green after being freed from a jar. The attendees, which include Uncle Bill, the dragon Icicle (serving frozen drinks), and Hattie the Mouse (who crafts striped rainbow hats for all), gather alongside Senexa, a dragon who brings tuna from Strawberry Island. As the Floofers, Mookers, and Mergirls join, Disco and Thisco perform lively ant-worm jazz on the bass and violin, transforming the event into a joyous dance party where everyone dines on fish and celebrates.

title: Wobbly Whisker and the Mountaintop Fish House
summary: Wobbly Whisker, the brave security cat, springs into action to rescue a cold baby bunny stranded on a piece of bark drifting in the lake. Using a special element boat, the security cats paddle across the water to safely deliver the bunny to a patch of green grass before returning her home. In gratitude, the bunny family catches fresh fish for the cats, leading to a wonderful feast. Afterward, the cats join Pixie and Jane to help them scale a steep mountain. At the summit, they find Ginger living in an incredible house made entirely of fish, supplied by a surprising mountaintop grocery store.

title: An Accidental Trip to Nana's House
summary: Seeker the wizard meets Isabella, who shows him her dollhouse-cleaning and garden flags. Seeking to explore, Seeker whips up a potion using grass, soft red flowers, water, and a pinch of dirt from Isabella's backyard. After drinking the potion, they are unexpectedly transported in the dark of night to Isabella's Nana's house instead. Assisted by the cat Gorp, who sniffs the air and identifies the scent of other cats and Nana's wild bear, Seeker learns about Nana's house. Isabella shows Seeker around the room, highlighting her blue dollhouse and a cozy block castle housing sleeping bunnies Silona and Syleaf. Relieved to hear that his goldfish Sanana is being fed by an automatic fish feeder back home, Seeker decides to stay the night. He settles into a room in the blue dollhouse and drifts to sleep under a brown cloak as Isabella sings him a sweet, soothing lullaby.

title: The Magic Star Potion and the Journey to Star World
summary: When young Isabella visits Seeker's cozy castle with a collection of seven-pointed cardboard stars, she inspires a magical experiment. Joined by scientists Bunsen and Beeker, they decide to grind up the stars to brew a magical potion. As friends like wizard Peacock, flying Gagak, and neighbor Dimitar contribute ingredients, a sticky kitten named Wobbly Whisker unexpectedly pops out of the bottle. After refining the recipe, the group takes a sip and is instantly transported to the magnificent expanse of Star World. There, they meet cat-like Mookers, reunite Wobbly Whisker with his mother, and zoom across the cosmos to speak with a wise, ancient star who offers the ultimate cosmic advice: to simply keep glowing.

title: The Salty Solution for a Frozen Island
summary: When the Ice Dragon, Icicle, accidentally freezes Dimitar’s circular island while trying to stop a volcanic eruption, the island's inhabitants must find a new home. Seeker and his friends Isabella and the superhero Mia Mayhem set out on a magic ladder to confront Icicle at his mountain palace. Upon learning Icicle's good intentions, they team up with Kitty, Zoe, and Sassafras to melt the frozen landscape using massive amounts of salt and warm water. After a successful cleanup, the residents celebrate with a salty feast, having saved the island from both fire and ice.

title: The Sparkling Dust of Book World
summary: Hattie the Mouse and Dimitar seek the wizard Seeker's help to resolve a heated argument over Dimitar’s collection of dragonet books. Dimitar is protective of his library because a friend once lost a precious book in the ocean, turning it into mush. With a compromise reached and a donation of extra books from Isabella, the trio tests a new potion made from magical book dust. They are transported to Book World, a realm where sentient volumes waddle on tiny feet and clouds are made of pages. After meeting a fact-filled Penguin Book and a sturdy Greenland Book, they return home with a superhero tale about Kitty and her cat-like powers.

title: The Rainbow Fruit World and the Great Lemon Fish Debate
summary: Seeker acts as a peacekeeper, first resolving a dispute between Dimitar and a sick mouse named Hattie over a single delicious fish. After suggesting they split it, Seeker is summoned by Rainbow and Pink Mergirl, who are fighting over their stuffed animals. To help them calm down, Seeker encourages them to 'stomp and squeak' before sewing a new seal stuffy so both can sleep peacefully. Their day concludes with a magical journey to Rainbow Fruit World using a tiny rainbow potion. There, they meet a Grape Cat and explore a land of blueberry oceans and pear sharks. Dimitar successfully catches a lemon fish, splashing everyone with juice, before they use a final potion to return to the castle.

title: The Squeaky Quest for the Balloon Palace
summary: Seeker and his companion Squeaky the balloon dog embark on a magical journey to Balloon World to return a balloon cat to her home. After navigating a landscape filled with balloon buildings and enduring funny static electricity, they visit the magnificent red Balloon Palace. There, they meet the Balloon King and reunite Squeaky the cat with her animal friends, including birds, parrots, and mice. Their adventure expands as Sana the orange balloon duck joins them, eager to learn about the human world and the mysterious rituals of bedtime.

title: The Cinnamon Potion and the Ant-Sized Tree
summary: After visiting Seeker's magical castle, Pooki the Pig and his friends sample a mysterious cinnamon-scented potion. A mishap with the teleportation rhyme—turned into a series of coughs—shrinks the group to the size of ants. Stranded on a bouncy green leaf high in a tree, they must avoid hungry birds and navigate the massive branches. They eventually return home using a special potion, ending their day with lemon ginger tea and a relaxing puzzle.

title: Rainbow Mergirl and the Kelp Forest Thief
summary: When Rainbow Mergirl discovers her kelp forest has been devoured down to the stubs, she suspects the local Kelpbasses. Alongside the dwarf Seeker, she encounters a struggling Kelpbass gasping for water in a dry castle. After saving the fish by bringing him to her water-filled home, Rainbow Mergirl realizes his thievery stems from a lack of hands to grow his own food. In a heartwarming conclusion, she reveals that she has planted a massive kelp farm in the fish's own backyard, ensuring he stays full and her garden stays safe.

title: The Thirty Cats of Kibble World
summary: When Seeker's home is suddenly overrun by thirty hungry cats, he decides to take them on a magical journey to find food. By mixing a special potion of kibble, wet food, and cat fur, the group is transported to Kibble World. In this unique land, every landmark from the trees to the clouds is made of edible kibble. Guided by the local Silvercat, the group feasts until their bellies are full, eventually settling down for a long, peaceful nap in the middle of the crunchy landscape.

title: Wobbly Whisker's Sticky Adventure on Planet Mooker
summary: After a potion mix-up, Wobbly Whisker the kitten finds herself stuck on the slimy Planet of the Mookers. Lost and covered in goo, she is rescued by Buddy the Mouse and Seeker, who take her back to their castle. While the heroes journey back to the Mooker library to find Mama Kitten—encountering giant fossils and a helpful librarian—the restless kitten accidentally covers the castle rug in slime. Reunited at last, Mama Kitten leads Wobbly Whisker home for a long-awaited bath and a night of squirmies.

title: Dr. Izzy and the Forest Rescue
summary: When Uncle Bill and Tot discover a mysterious, motionless creature in a forest clearing, they seek help from Seeker at his castle. Venturing into the woods with blue gloves and a Ziploc bag, they find a tiny brown mouse that is alive but severely ill. The team rushes the mouse, named Buddy, to the local animal hospital where Dr. Izzy and Nurse Daddy provide medicine, ointment, and water. After being treated for dehydration, Buddy is tucked into a comfy bed and lulled to sleep with a gentle lullaby, ensuring a full recovery.

title: Shark Friends and the Deep Deep Dark
summary: Dimitar and Seeker brew a magical concoction using unusual ingredients like feathers and maple syrup, which transports them to the Deep Deep Dark of the ocean. Exploring with special diving helmets, they meet a friendly Whale Shark and a Cookie Cutter Shark before encountering a Blackbelly Lanternshark who has lost his bioluminescent glow. Feeling lost and sad without his light, the shark receives help from the Mergirls and a red flashlight. When kelp fails to hold the light in place, a sturdy pipe cleaner saves the day. After a brief meeting with a miniature Pocket Shark, the two friends use a 'go-home potion' to return safely to Seeker's castle.

title: The Quest for the Moon Mother
summary: When the mischief rats of the basement lose their unfreezing powers to a thieving lion, Icicle the ice dragon is called upon to freeze them once and for all. Following this success, Dimatar and Seeker embark on a cosmic journey after consuming a magical Mars potion. Transformed into kittens, they are joined by the tiny Wobbly Whiskers, who is searching for her lost mother. Their quest leads them across the surface of Mars and into a high-tech cardboard rocket ship bound for the moon. After a successful lunar landing and a joyful family reunion, the group shares a final snack of fish before returning home by magic.

title: The Great Kelp Caper of the Pink Continent
summary: When Rainbow Mer-Girl discovers her backyard kelp forest has been devoured, she follows a trail of crumbs from the Big Pink Continent all the way to the Big Orange Continent of Australia. There, she confronts the hungry Kelp Bass responsible for the theft. Just as the underwater residents worry about their remaining greenery, the heroic Super Kitten arrives with a solution: starting a communal kelp farm. By planting rows of seedlings, the group ensures that everyone has enough to eat, protecting the local backyards from future raids.

title: The Mystery of the Missing Kelp Forest
summary: Deep at the bottom of the ocean, a mermaid family—Mamma Blue, Dadda Yellow, and their daughter Pink—lives in a house with a beautiful backyard kelp forest. During a playdate with their new friend Physi-Ona the Rainbow Murgirl, they discover their entire kelp forest has vanished. Following a trail of giant circular footprints and chewed-up kelp, they consult their neighbor Crabby, who leads them to a nearby sea cave. There, they find a family of bears who had unknowingly eaten the garden. To make things right, the bears and the murgirls join forces to plant a new, even larger kelp forest for the otters to enjoy.

title: Slime-Ka-Bye: The Beard-Dweller's Deep Sea Adventure
summary: Seeker the wizard is visited in his castle by Peacock the Wizard, who is on a quest for a magical diamond-shaped potion. After locating the kelp-scented brew in a hidden potion closet, the pair drinks the potion and utters the magic phrase 'Slime-ka-bye' to teleport to a breathtaking coral reef deep underwater. While exploring the sea, Seeker discovers a small, pink fish named Fishy-a has become tangled in his massive beard. The wizards rescue Fishy-a and bring her back to land using a 'going-home' potion, eventually settling her into a comfortable new home within a nest hidden inside a bush.

title: The Wizard Seker and the Magical Can Opener of Cat World
summary: In the halls of his castle, the wizard Seker is finishing breakfast when a dragon named Dimatar arrives with a quest. Along with their cat companions, Gorp and Pixie, the group consumes a teleportation potion and travels to the fur-filled realm of Cat World. There, they encounter Silver, a kitten who is struggling to open her food. Rather than simply opening it for her, Seker provides a "snergling" magical can opener to empower the kitten with self-reliance. After ensuring the cats of Cat World can feed themselves, the adventurers drink an "ooloo" potion to return home to the castle.

title: The Potion of the Gemstone Reef
summary: Seeker and Dematar embark on a magical quest after discovering a mysterious diamond-shaped potion in a hidden closet. Upon drinking the sparkly blue liquid, they are transported to the Underwater Coral Reef Gemstone World. However, a sudden coral allergy forces a hasty retreat to the surface, where they discover two colorful tropical fish have been accidentally rescued in Seeker's beard. After outfitting the wizard in a new gemstone cloak, the duo provides their new pets, Muska Scaphor and Sinaphia, with a safe home and a feast of sparkly fish food.

title: The Mookers, the Floofers, and the Solar Mookball
summary: On the Planet of the Mookers, a group of moose-like creatures loses their favorite mookball when it is accidentally thrown all the way to the Sun. Their incredibly bouncy neighbors, the Floofers, leap across the solar system—visiting Mars and the Moon—to retrieve the lost toy. After the ball is safely recovered, the two groups spend a joyful day playing games of floofcatch and mookball together before the Floofers return to their home in the clouds and the exhausted Mookers settle in for a long sleep.

title: The Magic of Slime School
summary: Students gather at Slime School to create vibrant, gooey masterpieces under the watchful eye of the Slime Teacher. From silver creatures brought to life with magic spells to pink mice holding chocolate cakes, the classroom is filled with colorful imagination. After a busy morning of crafting and sharing their slime sculptures, the students spend the rest of the day bouncing through the sticky hills of Slime World before returning home with their families.

title: The Bouncy Adventures in Balloon World
summary: Seeker and Peacock the Wizard embark on an educational journey at a school in Balloon World, crafting intricate balloon mermaids and snacking on magical strawberries. After an energetic day of play on a bouncy, squeaky balloon playground, Seeker is reunited with his mother, Zozo. Their adventure concludes with a red car ride home for a quiet evening of dinner and bedtime stories.

title: Orange Frasgle and the Blackberry Seed
summary: When Orange Frasgle gets a blackberry seed painfully stuck in his many sharp teeth, he must visit the Frasgle Dentist in the vibrant Rainbow Frasgle World. Through careful flossing and extensive brushing, the red-colored dentist successfully removes the obstruction. Accompanied by his mother and his friends Superhero Izzy, Seeker, and Hattie the Mouse, the relieved Orange Frasgle decides to head back to his cozy house in the forest for a well-deserved nap.

title: A Sticky Adventure to the Castle of Slime
summary: Seeker and Wizard Bobizard discover a mysterious blue and orange potion created by Isabella. After drinking it and reciting a magical rhyme, they are transported to Slime World, a bouncy yet incredibly sticky land. Guided by an alien named Sneeter, they explore a ball-shaped slime castle filled with fuzzy Snooper-ka-floopers. They learn that the Queen of Slime World has been helping a lost kitten named Jinjar—the notorious Balloon Popper—return home. Following their encounter, the group drinks a returning potion to safely arrive back at Seeker's castle.

title: The Sneaky Popper of Balloon World
summary: Uncle Bill and Seeker travel to the vibrant Balloon World, a place made entirely of balloons, only to find it under threat from a mysterious 'Sneaky Popper.' They join forces with Squeaky the Balloon Dog and a team of feline superheroes, including the time-stopping Mea Mayhem and the courageous Kitty, to investigate the popped balloons. The trail leads them to a balloon farm where they eventually discover the culprit: a playful baby kitten who didn't mean any harm. By providing the kitten with toys and yarn to satisfy its playfulness, the heroes successfully save Balloon World and receive colorful balloons from the King as a reward.

title: The Squeaky Adventures in Balloon World
summary: Seeker and Isabella discover a magical potion that transports them to the whimsical realm of Balloon World. Alongside their friend Balloonie and a purple balloon dog named Squeaky, they explore the wonders of the Balloon Twisting School and the majestic Balloon Castle. Their adventure concludes with a cozy sleepover in a world made entirely of colorful, air-filled creations.

title: The Gopher’s Squerret Quest in Australia
summary: Kitty and her cat crew embark on a mission to Australia to visit Goofy the Gopher. Upon finding that Goofy has a dry throat, the resourceful team provides him with a sink and water pipe. After exploring Goofy’s root cellar, the crew travels to Perfectly Square Island to fetch "squerrets"—unique square carrots—from Farmer Wobble. The journey culminates in a thrilling, high-speed ride down a spirally tunnel slide.

title: Dimitar's Flight to Cadasori
summary: Dimitar, a flying dragonette, embarks on a journey to a school called Cadasori with his mother. Along the way, they encounter a car full of cats before arriving at their destination. There, Dimitar meets his teacher, Izzy, and begins a creative new lesson in the art of beadwork.

title: The Flying Friends of Strawberry Island
summary: Dimetar, a young flying dragonet, enjoys a busy day at school on Circular Island. After a lunch of fish crackers and a restful nap with his purple cat stuffie, Sanina, he heads outside for playground time. While his other friends are grounded, he meets Zudy, a red and green dragonet visiting from Strawberry Island. The two take to the skies for a dizzying aerial display before their mothers, Allego and Demora, meet to arrange a cross-island playdate.

title: Dimatar's Big Day at Ginger Catasorry
summary: When Isabella visits her dragonet friend Dimatar, she brings him a fish-flavored cupcake and news that he can now attend Ginger Catasorry. This specialized school, for cats and dragonets, offers a full curriculum including world geography on a planet map, drawing lessons, and bead counting. Dimatar makes friends with a soft gray cat named Ginger over snacks of fish and kibble, sings songs during circle time, and explores a playground equipped with specialized wing-rails. After a full day of learning and fun, Dimatar is picked up by his mom, having successfully completed his first day of school.

title: The Dragonettes and the Rainbow Forest Quest
summary: The Dragonettes set off on a series of whimsical journeys across magical realms, beginning with the geometric wonders of Square Island. Their quest takes them deep into the vibrant Rainbow Forest to find a lost Floofer—a wide-eyed, bouncy creature that hails from the velvety Floofer Cloud. Along their path, they encounter the eccentric Farmer Wobble and a snack-loving mouse named Rosie, discovering a world where they can feast on fish and ice while exploring the softest clouds in the sky.

title: The Sleepy-Time Science Experiment
summary: Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker are determined to stay awake to conduct scientific experiments, but they eventually decide to turn their sleepiness into a study of lullabies. After testing several songs, Beaker falls fast asleep. Bunsen then listens to a soothing 'sleepcast' about the peaceful activities at a local laundromat on Sesame Street, where friends fold laundry and wait patiently for their blankets to be clean. Through the calming sounds of folding and rhythmic breathing, the restless scientists find the relaxation they need.

title: Doctor Izzy's Busy Hospital Day
summary: Doctor Izzy manages a hectic day at her hospital, treating a diverse array of patients with everything from long toenails to sprained wings. With a steady hand and a collection of specialized tools, she performs rapid tonsillectomies, interprets X-rays, and administers vitamins to those in need. After a long day of documenting infections and performing miraculous recoveries, she successfully discharges every patient, ensuring everyone returns home healthy and healed.

title: Dr. Izzy's Musical Cure
summary: When a patient arrives with a painful earache, Dr. Izzy performs a thorough examination using her medical tools. After confirming the severity of the soreness, she skips traditional medicine and prescribes a specialized treatment of music to aid the recovery.

title: The Floof-Berry Mission and the Great Snowstorm
summary: Seeker and Disco set off on a magical journey to Izzy's attic, using a special potion and a magic rhyme to transport themselves there. Their mission is to find parts for a machine that spins fast enough to fly like a helicopter, allowing Seeker to deliver essential floof-berries to the inhabitants of the distant Upper Floofer Cloud. While Seeker focuses on his aerial delivery, Disco plans to build a reinforced mole tunnel to protect them from a massive approaching snowstorm. As Bunsen tracks the howling winds and deep snow on a specialized storm tracker, the group prepares to stay cozy indoors, growing seeds for the cats and waiting for the sun to return so they can eventually play in the deep drifts.

title: The Floofer's Trampoline and the Butterfly Valentine
summary: Siffle Papiffle, a small red floofer with a talent for high bouncing, sets out from the fluffy Floofer Cloud on a quest for a trampoline. His journey leads to an unexpected encounter with Zoot the puppet, who arrives with a special orange trampoline. Together with a cast of magical friends, they modify the invention for safety before celebrating their new friendship with a sparkling, butterfly-themed Valentine’s surprise and a joyful song.

title: A Valentine for Gravity Goldfish
summary: Sophie Mouse and her friend Bearhead set out to make Valentine's Day special for an unlikely recipient: the city-destroying supervillain, Gravity Goldfish. After Sophie bakes a batch of goldfish-themed cupcakes, the duo composes an elaborate rhyming card to express their affection. Though he initially scoffs at the holiday, Gravity Goldfish is deeply moved by the unexpected kindness. Realizing that he is truly loved, the villain decides to reconsider his mischievous ways and enjoys the treats made just for him.

title: The Great Kibble Cat-astrophe
summary: When Seeker discovers his home has been mysteriously overrun by dozens of cats drawn by a surplus of kibble, he faces the challenge of reclaiming his space. From Scratch Cat to a talking cat crew, the feline visitors take over every room and even Seeker's bed. With the arrival of Superhero Izzy and a clever plan involving a trail of seven special treats, the cats are lured away into a custom-made nest. Order is finally restored, allowing Seeker and Scratch Cat to share a unique pot of wet food tea before settling in for a peaceful sleepover.

title: Cosmic Controls at the Captain's Desk
summary: An interstellar expedition takes flight as a crew navigates the vast wonders of the cosmos, from the red sands of Mars to the swirling storms of Jupiter's Great Red Spot. From the command station at the Captain's Desk, the mission monitors critical temperature levels near Venus and charts a course through the rings of Saturn and across the continents of Earth. Between cosmic maneuvers, the crew manages life on board, preparing specialized snacks and refreshing drinks for their animal companions as they explore the reach of the solar system.

title: The Quest for Floofer Kaploofer
summary: Dimitar the dragonet and his tall friend Icicle embark on a high-seas adventure to the mysterious Rainbow Forest Island. Their mission: to rescue the lost Floofer Kaploofer. Guided by colorful flashlights and joined by a resourceful mouse named Hattie, the group journeys through forests of every hue. After discovering the missing floofer buried in the orange sands, they work together to clean her up and bring her safely back home to the Floofer Cloud.

title: The Ice Dragon's New Hat
summary: Icecycle the dragon lives a lonely life in his mountain ice castle until his friend Hattie Mouse visits with a special gift: a handcrafted ice hat adorned with jewels and sunblock. Soon, Bearhead the Ice King awakens from a long slumber and discovers his crown is broken. Seeking help, they turn to Miss Plier, a skilled mouse mechanic, to repair the royal headpiece using her trusty tools and restore the king's glory.

title: Winterworld Rescue and the Magic Shining Hat
summary: Seeker sets out on a perilous mission to Winterworld after receiving a magical shining hat and winter gear from Hatty Mouse. His goals are to rescue a stranded traveler and locate experimental ice towers hidden in the snow. Upon arrival, Seeker saves a mouse named Winston, who has been buried under the snow after a snow angel accident. When Seeker realizes he has run out of teleportation potions to return home, the duo calls upon Izzy Superhero, who uses her magic flying cape to carry them back to Seeker's workshop to brew new potions and warm up with tea.

title: The Ice Dragon's Sparkly Castle and the Great Ice Festival
summary: A young girl named Izzy and her companion Messer fly to a mountaintop to visit Icicle, an enormous white dragon living in a frozen castle. They bring a thoughtful Christmas gift—a polishing kit and wet wipes—to help the dragon maintain his sparkly home against the mountain's grit. While their friend Demitar hunts for a snack, the group learns about a grand Ice Festival from Rizzo the Rat, who arrives with a magazine detailing the event. The friends share a meal of frozen pecans and fresh fish as they eagerly prepare for the festival where all the ice dragons gather.

title: Dimitar and the Castle of Ice Fangsicle
summary: Dimitar, a small but experienced dragonet, is sent on a quest by the Mayor of his jungle town to find ice for the upcoming summer festival. His journey takes him to the highest mountains, where he encounters Ice Fangsicle, a massive, lonely dragon living in a castle made of ice. After Dimitar convinces the giant that he can find friendship among the dragonets, Ice Fangsicle joins him on the journey home. Together, they arrive just in time to celebrate the festival, where the giant dragon uses his icy breath to provide frozen treats for all the inhabitants.

title: Science in the Bakery
summary: Sophie the baker ventures to a science lab to join Bunsen Honeydew and Beaker for a day of experimentation. After receiving specialized laboratory goggles from her mother, she learns the secrets of color-mixing to enhance her frosting recipes. The group then visits Sophie's bakery, where she showcases her unique culinary creations, including meat-salad cupcakes and pork tortilla treats.

title: The Case of the Carrot-Loving Gophers
summary: Rizzo the Rat and Miss Piggy team up with Kitty the Superhero to investigate the secret lives of gophers. Wearing special protective suits and armed with a map, they discover a hidden tunnel inhabited by Goober the Gopher and his sister Luba. The group is treated to a tour of a lush vegetable garden, where they learn that gophers aren't dangerous—they're just hungry for snacks like carrots and snap peas. After sharing an apple from the winter's farmers market, the adventurers part ways as the gophers settle in for a nap.

title: Late Night Tea with Mrs. Piggy and the Muppets
summary: In a series of late-night visits, the Muppets drop by Seeker's house for snacks and storytelling. Mrs. Piggy and her sister Curlustava recount the plot of a Muppet movie involving a sibling rivalry over broken toys and Kermit the Frog's grand plan to reclaim his old house. The adventure culminates in a nighttime car journey driven by a robot to gather all the Muppets for a grand show, while a quiet visit from Animal the drummer rounds out the evening with a discussion on favorite colors and cloaks.

title: The Sardine Bakery and the Rainbow Disco Birthday
summary: A dragonet named Dimatar visits the Eat and Greet Bakery on Pineberry Avenue, where a pink mouse named Sophie serves him unique treats like sardine cupcakes and fish coffee with milk. After bonding over the fishy snacks, Dimatar joins Sophie in preparing a special sprinkle-covered cake for their friend Flutter’s birthday. The group of dragonets and moles journeys to Croquet Road for a festive celebration featuring a humidifier gift and a lively dance-off to the song 'Rainbow Disco Unicorn.'

title: Kitty's Crew and the Underground Adventure
summary: Superhero Kitty and her loyal Cat Crew embark on an underground excursion to visit their gopher friends. After navigating a complex route across Christmas Tree Mountain and past the bunny ornament, they meet an old gopher named Nibbler who leads them deep into the tunnels. The adventurers share snacks of broccoli, tubers, and dried bananas before competing in a high-stakes game of 'speed nibbling' against the legendary Goober Gopher.

title: Kitty the Cat Superhero and the Gopher Tunnel Visit
summary: Kitty, a human girl dressed in a cat costume, acts as a superhero who protects people and talks to animals. During a visit to the underground tunnels with her mole friend Uncle Grisco, she meets a young gopher named Goober. While her cat Pumpkin is initially terrified of the large gopher, Kitty and Goober bond over their differences and her recent heroic feat of returning a stolen golden tiger statue to a museum. The encounter ends with plans for future visits and breakfast at a diner.

title: The Savior of the Castle
summary: A brave girl named Isabella returns to a grand castle she once helped save. She presents its inhabitant, Dimitar, with a handmade card expressing her love for the beautiful fortress.

title: The Polka-Dotted Car and the Shadow Lab
summary: Uncle Grisco is interrupted during his scientific experiments by his friend Victor, who needs a watering can for the flowers in his backyard playhouse. The pair sets off in a vibrant pink and blue striped car with orange polka dots to Mischief's Hardware Store. After a search through tiny dollhouse supplies, Victor finds a medium-sized red watering can with orange polka dots. Upon returning, they dive back into the wonders of science, exploring how the position of light creates shadows of vastly different sizes.

title: The Giant Rescue on Volcano Island
summary: When a frantic letter arrives from a small purple dragonet named Dimitar, the adventurer Seeker and his companions, Hattie the Mouse and Izzy, set off for a mysterious circular island. They soon discover that Dimitar’s castle is built on the slopes of a rumbling volcano that is about to erupt. Using a magic flying ladder and an ancient "Embiggening" spell, Seeker transforms into a giant to physically move the stone fortress to safety before the island’s tiny dragonet inhabitants lose their home.

title: Seeker's Tour of the Rooftop Garden and Dollhouse
summary: A tiny adventurer named Seeker explores Isabella's magical house, visiting a cardboard castle with a sprawling rooftop garden guarded by the vigilant Old Cat. After touring sections filled with honeybees and spiders, Seeker heads home, drinks a calming chamomile tea potion, and eventually snuggles into a cozy crib for a good night's rest, watched over by a giant friend in her own big kid bed.

title: The Potion to Izzy's Attic
summary: Seeker and Uncle Crisco drink a magical potion to travel to Izzy's house. After a cozy night spent on unique beds like a cheese mouse pillow and a bush bed, the group explores an attic filled with Legos and art supplies. They spend the morning building a variety of robots and drawing pictures of magical creatures and skyships before the travelers return home using a vanishing potion.

title: The Potion to the Little Hotel House
summary: Seeker the dwarf and Uncle Grisco the mole embark on an interdimensional journey after discovering a magical potion closet. Choosing a draught that leads to the human world, they find themselves in the bedroom of a girl named Izzy. The travelers are given an enthusiastic tour of a house that feels like a little hotel, filled with treasures like a blue starry rug, a new baby, and a mouse named Ralph who lives in a book.

title: The Magic of Mooska-Kadooska
summary: In the deep, winding tunnels of a mountain home, a young student named Seeker prepares for his first lesson in the magical arts. Guided by the wise mole teacher, Ove, Seeker discovers that spells are powered by imagination and rhyme. When the class begins practicing disappearance and reappearance magic, Seeker invents his own unique incantation, 'Mooska-Kadooska,' setting off a journey of wonder in the darkness of the subterranean school.

title: Seeker's Guide to Volcanoes, Space, and Sunlight
summary: Uncle Grisco visits Seeker to explore the wonders of the universe. Their scientific journey begins deep within the Earth, explaining how molten lava erupts through volcanoes to form basalt, obsidian, and pumice. The conversation then turns to the cosmos, discussing the atmosphere that ignites shooting stars and the low-gravity landscapes of the moon. Finally, Seeker explains the miracle of photosynthesis, revealing how leaves harness sunlight and air to help trees grow.

title: Seeker's Stone-Carving Expedition
summary: Seeker, a young dwarf living in a vast mountain kingdom, is sent by his mother Ovage on an expedition to learn the secrets of his people. He first visits a tunnel-digging crew to understand the heavy labor and tools required to shape their underground world. His journey then takes him to the Great Library, where he observes master carvers creating a beautiful stone image of a cat named Silver on the ceiling. Inspired, Seeker visits a workshop to carve his own masterpiece—a stone finger—which he proudly displays in his home. After a day of exploration, Seeker returns to his family for a feast of beef and sweet potatoes before settling in for bed.

title: The Solar Expedition of Stars and Snories
summary: A mole pilot, an eager explorer, and a stowaway mouse embark on a daring journey to the sun from a suburban backyard. Traveling in a tiny, high-tech spaceship equipped with heat shields and oxygen, the crew navigates past the cratered moon and explores the mechanics of gravity. They witness the blazing spectacle of sunspots and solar flares while discussing the biology of deep-sea creatures and the nature of distant stars. After a successful observation of the solar corona, they perform a stellar U-turn to safely return home to Earth.

title: Science and Hand Mountains with Seeker and Uncle Grisco
summary: Seeker and Uncle Grisco spend an evening exploring the mysteries of the natural world. Using a magical model of the Earth, Seeker demonstrates how shifting continental plates create deep ocean trenches and massive mountain ranges. Their curiosity extends to the mechanics of humidifiers and the unique characteristics of pine trees. The session ends with a brief visit from a giant friend at the door before both friends retire to their respective homes for the night.

title: The Polka-Dot Potion and the Magic Spell
summary: Seeker prepares for a grand expedition by visiting Uncle Grisko with a collection of magical sleep potions. After a busy day of errands—including buying a badger for a baby dog—Seeker shares a strawberry-flavored, blue and yellow polka-dotted drink. By reciting the powerful chant 'Salaiska, Kabuska, Kadoo,' the two friends drift off into a deep, restful slumber.

title: The Red Planet Potion
summary: A curious band of travelers, including Papa Mole and the scientific Uncle Grisco, visit the home of Seeker to begin a journey beyond the stars. After selecting a swirling multi-colored potion from a magical closet, the group recites an ancient spell to transport themselves to the surface of Mars. Shielded by a magic bubble of air, they explore the rocky Martian landscape, investigate massive impact craters, and observe the planet's unique pinkish sky before safely returning home using a special brew.

title: Seeker's Deep Earth Adventure
summary: Seeker recruits a family of moles for a daring mission of exploration into the depths of the earth. Equipped with provisions like water bottles, keys, and headlamps, the team digs past soil and rock to find a secret staircase with handrails. Descending into the darkness, they discover the Kingdom of the Blind Mice. After exchanging stories and sharing a feast of fresh surface vegetables and cheese with their hosts, the explorers return through the long tunnels to the sunlit world above.

title: Magic Mole's New Apartment and the Great Nut Feast
summary: A stuffed mole celebrates moving into his whimsical new apartment by hosting his friend Seeker for a tour of his piano and special apple-shaped stool. Together with Isabella, they visit their neighbor Pakarito, a chipmunk with a gourmet stash of hazelnuts and walnuts. While the friends enjoy a nut-filled feast, they dream of a magic potion that could help a toothless stuffie join in on the crunchy snacks before nap time ends their adventure.

title: The Bouncing Floofers of the Golden Cloud
summary: Seeker, Hattie the Mouse, and the Crystal Mountain Caretaker use a golden sparkling potion to teleport to the Floofer Cloud. Upon arrival, they discover a land of soft ground and golden mist inhabited by Floofers—small, bouncy creatures that resemble living pom-poms. After meeting the energetic Ziggety Ziggety Zack, the group realizes the Floofers are exhausted but cannot stop jumping long enough to rest. By singing a gentle lullaby, they help the creatures finally fall asleep before using a return potion to travel back to Seeker's home.

title: Rainbow Disco Science with Uncle Grisco
summary: Disco, Disco, and Papa Mole embark on a trip to the home of Uncle Grisco, a dedicated science teacher. Amidst discussions of the magical Rainbow Disco Unicorns from their favorite Dingo-O songs, Uncle Grisco explains the true nature of rainbows. He teaches the visitors how white sunlight is split into a colorful spectrum by water droplets and brainstorms scientific ways to create rainbows using prisms, garden hoses, and creative artwork.

title: Ova's Birthday and the Quiet Mole Exploration
summary: Ova the mouse celebrates her fifth birthday with a lively downstairs dance party featuring cake and a song about the continents. Later, a group of moles including Papa Mole and Disco embark on an exploration through a dark bedroom. They navigate a rug and climb up to a large bed to discover an incredibly soft new blanket. After receiving permission from Isabella, the moles settle in for a cozy nap, agreeing to remain silent so as not to bother her.

title: Mama Mole's Sidewalk Safari
summary: Mama Mole and young Disco set out on a nature walk down the sidewalk with their collection baskets. Along the way, they discover a rock shaped like a ginkgo leaf, a pinecone for crafting, and a green black walnut. After helping a hungry squirrel find a walnut tree, they encounter a mysterious, furry, clover-like object. Uncle Grisko, the science teacher, eventually identifies the sticky specimen as an unripe, crushed strawberry.

title: Zigzag the Dancing Robot and the Cornebyborn Dance
summary: Papa Mole brings a special surprise to Disco and Disca: a pocket-sized robot named Zigzag! The family spends the day teaching Zigzag how to perform made-up words, navigate pretend slides, and master complex dance moves like the 'Cornebyborn' and the 'Rainbow Disco.' Though Zigzag tries his best to mimic human movements, his batteries eventually run low, and he settles down for a nap after drawing a picture of his robot friend.

title: Papa Mole's Lunar Expedition
summary: Papa Mole, Disco, and Thisco blast off in a snack-filled rocket ship for a grand expedition to the moon. Exploring the gray, cratered landscape in specialized oxygen-equipped spacesuits, the trio experiences the thrill of low gravity, bouncing high into the air. Their adventure takes a surprising turn when they discover mysterious moon worms living in a giant crater. After a quick retreat to the ship and a narrow escape from the wiggling creatures, the tired explorers return safely to Earth just in time for bed.

title: Under the Bed and Over the Sky
summary: Papa Mole and a band of Mischief Moles embark on a daring nighttime expedition into the mysterious territory beneath a child's bed. Armed with headlamps and flashlights, they navigate through dust bunnies and past snack-hunting moles to rescue a magical giraffe stuffie. With vibrant rainbow fur and secret wings, the giraffe must find her way past a noisy construction site to reunite with her Mama Bird and return to their home in the deep forest.

title: A Midnight Snack for a Sleepy Kitten
summary: When a mysterious visitor named Popomal arrives at the home of two friends named Disco, he brings along a tiny, hungry kitten. The hospitable hosts welcome the kitten inside, offering warm affection and a satisfying meal of treats and kibble. After the kitten's belly is full, it grows tired and receives gentle pats before curling up and falling fast asleep to a soothing lullaby.

title: Mission to Silver's Planet
summary: Captain Izzy pilots a rocket ship on a daring journey to Silver's Planet for a special playdate with a kitten named Silver. Along the way, the crew avoids massive space rocks and conducts vital scientific research. After a successful 'down to landoff,' Izzy greets Silver with treats and space rocks collected from the void. The visit features a high-energy original song about cats before the crew departs for home. The mission concludes with a safe landing back on Earth, just in time for the explorers to head inside for bed.

title: The Quest to Close the Limbo Rift
summary: A terrifying rift has opened between the world and the scary realm of Limbo, threatening everyone. To save humanity, brave adventurers like Seeker and Silver must venture into this dangerous place and seal the opening. Equipped with superhero costumes, protective helmets, magic potions, and flashlights to guide their way, the heroes must summon all their courage. While the journey is difficult, the mission is clear: face the darkness and close the gate before it's too late.

title: Dimitar and the Blueberry Dragon Pop
summary: Dimitar, a tiny purple dragon, hatches from a small egg in a mountain nest made of gold, glitter, and dragon branches. After a rough start trying to find the perfect snack—rejecting leaves and sticks in favor of cold, refreshing blueberry raisin dragon pops—Dimitar realizes he needs a new place to live. Guided by Isabella and Taylee Mouse, the group uses a secret map to fly from the cold mountains to a lush jungle, where the little dragon prepares to build his new home.

title: Dimitar the Dragon and the Sleepy Moles
summary: As the day draws to a close, a family of moles prepares for bed. Papa Mole gently tucks everyone in and finishes a chapter from the legendary book of Dimitar the Dragon. With a promise to continue the adventure another night, he shares words of love and bids a peaceful goodnight to Disco.

title: Haddy the Mouse and the Quest for the Talking Hat
summary: Haddy the mouse is recruited by Seeker the dwarf for a peculiar quest: find a talking hat for his friend Afiska's upcoming journey. Utilizing magic potions and tiny airplanes, the pair travels to the Land of the Clouds. After consulting a flying millipede, they venture into a massive thunder cloud where they encounter Graw, a giant white bird. Graw introduces them to Floofers—flying jellyfish-like beings that enjoy resting on heads to act as talking hats. Haddy successfully befriends a Floofer named Fershika, completing the quest and returning to the workshop with a new talking companion for Afiska.

title: Hattie's Flight to the Songo Feast
summary: Hattie the mouse embarks on a grand journey to reach a legendary feast at the Songo Restaurant. To get there, she must board an airplane at the airport and fly high above mountains and forests toward Cornell Street. Guided by a captain following a specific flight plan, Hattie and her friend Avery the baby mole eventually land, cross a drawbridge, and arrive at a cozy bedroom. There, they enjoy a massive buffet from the family bowl, sampling everything from mangoes to a mysterious 'cup of taste' before heading home for a well-deserved nap.

title: The Galactic Search for Chicky
summary: When Chicky is captured and taken across the galaxy, Captain Hand Creature and Pilot Isabella assemble a motley crew to track her down. From the red deserts of Mars to the sweltering plains of Venus and the icy darkness of Pluto, the team follows a trail of secret messages and tiny footprints. Their journey leads them toward the mysterious Planet of the Mookers in a race to bring their friend home safely.

title: The Moles' Great Aquarium Adventure
summary: The moles Disco and Thisco embark on a vibrant journey through a local aquarium. Guided by an employee named Asasta, they tour various exhibits featuring African cichlids, crabs, and jellyfish, even pausing to sing a song about a 'Caribbean amphibian.' They watch in awe as Fingo, a scuba-diving mole, maintains a massive habitat filled with hundreds of shimmering rainbow fish. The adventure concludes in a basement petting area where the moles bravely touch a starfish and a high-energy baby shark that feels as powerful as a truck. After an exhausting day of marine discovery, the moles return home to rest.

title: Monch the Lizard and the Minty Meditation
summary: While wandering through a mucky, peaceful swamp in their galoshes, the Mischief Moles encounter a towering, green-scaled lizard creature named Monch. Though initially cautious of his long sticky tongue, the moles help Monch forage for fresh mint to brew a pot of fragrant tea. As they sit by a small fire, the lizard man teaches the moles the calming practice of meditation, guiding them through reflections on the warmth of family love and the simple joy of sharing a collective giggle.

title: Izzy the Kiddo and the Crystal Mountain Rescue
summary: A brave family of moles—Papa Mole, Disco, Thistle, and Baby Mole—embarks on a treacherous climb up the Magical Crystal Mountain to rescue Dingo, a fellow mole stranded at the peak with no boots. Aided by Izzy the Kiddo, the group survives wibbly-wobbly crystal bridges, a multi-colored glowing tunnel, and a encounter with a giant fluffy bunny. Armed with superhero costumes, flashlights, and a fresh pair of orangey-yellow galoshes, the team reaches the summit to save their friend. After a hearty meal of ants and worms, the moles complete their mission and return home safely as heroes.

title: The Star-Lit Basket Adventure
summary: A mole named Disco finds himself in a most unusual home: a glowing basket perched atop a lion stool. Unlike his usual underground tunnel, this basket shines with a bright light that projects stars onto the walls and ceiling. Disco and his friends explore the dazzling interior before climbing onto the roof to bask in the starlight. Their quiet night is interrupted by the arrival of Popplemoll and his cat, Gemstone. Even the hooting owls join the group, as they all settle down together for a cozy story on their star-lit rooftop.

title: The Legend of the Ice Gem
summary: A family of moles leaves their forest burrow for a grand expedition across the treacherous Plain of Ice. Guided by a map provided by the local cartographer, Pisco, they traverse snowy fields and sliding mountains before discovering a hidden, blue-sparkling ice cave. Within its frozen walls, Baby Mole unearths a magical Ice Gem with the power to freeze objects. Exhausted from their journey, the moles consume a mystical potion and chant a secret rhyme to instantly return to the safety of their warm beds.

title: The Best Mole Hole Ever
summary: Papa Mole builds a grand new tunnel home, enlisting his family to sweep out over 1,120 pieces of dirt before decorating with windows, stairs, and furniture. Exhausted by their efforts, the entire mole family, including Mama and Grandma Mole, quickly falls into a deep slumber. Their peaceful rest is eventually interrupted by the arrival of Gagok, a magic paper bird, and a flock of chickadees. After sharing a breakfast of twigs, worms, and ants, the birds also succumb to sleep right on the kitchen table, leading to much laughter when the moles wake up. The group then contemplates a journey to the Crystal Mountain to ensure the paper birds can find more magic crystals.

title: The Mischief Moles and the Plane of Fire
summary: The Mischief Moles family—Papa Mole, Disco, and Thisco—are visited by Seeker, a mysterious tiny man who tasks them with mapping magical realms. Choosing a fire-themed potion, the family is transported to the intense Plane of Fire. Braving the extreme heat with a magically summoned air conditioner, they soon face an erupting volcano. To survive, the moles dig a deep tunnel and pass the time by telling stories of other planes, such as the Plane of Grass and the Plane of Mud. Once the eruption ends, a mystical flame bird appears and guides them toward the summit of the volcano to complete their cartographic mission.

title: The Mischief Moles and the Kingdom of the Ants
summary: Elliot the Elephant has lost his precious gemstones, prompting the expert mystery solvers, Disco and Visco the Mischief Moles, to spring into action. Digging deep beneath the earth, the duo navigates through dark caves and treacherous mud until they stumble upon a bustling underground civilization: the Kingdom of the Ants and Worms. With the help of some unexpected friends and their magical Mousketools, the moles delve even deeper to uncover a mysterious wooden box. Inside, they find the radiant treasure and return it to their grateful elephant friend, proving no mystery is too deep for the Mischief Moles.

title: Stars and Stories: The Great Cat Rescue
summary: Under a canopy of stars, the Mischief Moles set out on a nighttime walk through a dark forest. They meet Izzy, a determined girl with a flashlight on a mission to find her lost cats, Jane and Alexander. To stay safe in the darkness, the group holds hands as they navigate the woods. Upon hearing meows from a high tree branch, Izzy uses a ladder and a bag of treats to lure the felines to safety. The grateful cats are rewarded with exactly two and a half treats each before the group's nighttime adventure concludes.

title: Auntie Mulberry's Magical Mole Pie
summary: Two curious moles named Disco and Thisco wander through the forest and stumble upon a mysterious cottage owned by Auntie Mulberry, a rabbit with purple hair and a passion for baking. Auntie Mulberry recruits the moles to help her find ingredients for a magical pie. Together, they gather an unusual assortment of fillings including sweet raisins, salty bacon, and a slithery mixture of slime and "cotton-all," creating a one-of-a-kind culinary adventure in the heart of the woods.

title: Mossy's New Home at River Lake
summary: Disco and Thisco, two moles busy digging a new forest tunnel, encounter an unusual walking piece of moss named Mossy. Struggling with the dry air, Mossy asks the moles for help. After a refreshing spray from a hose, the moles carry Mossy to the damp shores of River Lake. There, Mossy finds a perfect sun-drenched rock and is joined by two new companions: Iza and Frisky, a South American Marcella Moss who made the long journey by airplane. Together, they settle into their new home in the heart of the forest.

title: The Moles' Intergalactic Snack Run
summary: Two adventurous moles named Disco and Disco discover a hidden red button while digging beneath a garden. Pressing it launches them into space aboard a shiny metal rocket ship stocked with 'Zingos'—a delicious snack of worms and ants. Guided by Captain Izzy, the crew navigates to the planet Sauthica to deliver life-saving sandwiches to the tiny, starving Mookers. After a quick visit to the Odic Aquarium to see a giant Angler fish, the brave explorers return safely to Earth just in time for bed.

title: The Busy Day of Disco and Disco Moles
summary: In this subterranean adventure, Papa Mole and his adventurous children, Disco and Disco, embark on an action-packed journey through their favorite spots. From a magical toy store featuring a toy toilet to a zoo bustling with baby animals, the mole family explores the world with curiosity and joy. Their day reaches a peak at the mole playground, where they navigate tunnels and conquer the heights of Mole Mountain. To conclude their day, the moles engage in 'tunnel mischief,' digging elaborate paths for friends, including a cavernous tunnel perfect for their bear friend, Zingo, to begin his winter hibernation.

title: Disco and Thisco: The Great Bookcase Mischief
summary: Two adventurous moles, Disco and Thisco, embark on a mission of mischief beneath a dark bookcase. Equipped with headlamps, they navigate through clouds of dust and discover a forgotten toy car. After a wild ride making loops in the dirt, the duo engages in a series of mischievous activities, from building towers to creating 'dust-mole butterflies.' Exhausted from their subterranean escapades, they return to their cozy tunnel for a well-deserved sleep.

title: Disco and Thisco's Deep-Sea Submarine Adventure
summary: Disco and Thisco embark on a grand undersea voyage in a custom-built plastic bottle submarine. Accompanied by helpful moles, the duo packs their vessel with essentials like snacks, oxygen tanks, controllers, and even dental floss. Their journey takes them twenty miles beneath the waves, navigating past deep-sea trenches and a massive bridge with a stop at a local underwater coffee shop. Upon reaching the vibrant coral reefs, they marvel at a world of colorful fish, jellyfish, and octopuses. Their mission continues toward the very bottom of the ocean, where the mysterious Kingdom of the Sea Mice awaits their arrival.

title: Mickey's Adventure and the Deep Sea Shark
summary: After a mouse named Mickey leaves his home for a grand adventure, a mermaid named Jessica takes to the deep sea in a submarine. Exploring the vast underwater world, she eventually comes face-to-face with a shark. The rest of her long and mysterious journey is left to the wonders of imagination.

title: The Mischief Moles and the Dusty Bookshelf
summary: Two mischievous moles named Disco set out on a grand adventure across a vast rug filled with obstacles like Montessori blocks and a towering lion stool. After failing to jump over the furniture, they receive a flight to their destination: the dark, dusty realm beneath the bookshelf. Defying expectations of tidiness, the moles gather buckets of cat hair and dust from the floor to make their new home even messier, celebrating their successful mission of total chaos.

title: The Mischiefy Moles and the Bookcase of Chaos
summary: Two adventurous moles named Disco and Fisco set out to cause mischief in a child's bedroom. They scale a tall bookcase to reach the top shelves and accidentally knock over a lamp before heading to the dark space beneath a chair. Armed with a flashlight, they hide rusty old toys in their new lair. However, their pranks are quickly outstaged by the arrival of Mischief Mouse, who wreaks havoc by toppling the entire bookshelf and all the pictures, proving that there really is such a thing as too much trouble.

title: The Puking Cats Anthem
summary: Cats are wreaking havoc by puking in every corner of the home, specifically choosing to target the bed while inexplicably avoiding their litter boxes. One particularly finicky feline spends an entire day vomiting throughout the house, leading to confusion and a call for others to join in the feline-themed song.

title: The Mystery of the Pool Noodle Nibbler
summary: When a pool noodle in the backyard is discovered with mysterious bite marks, Mickey, Minnie, and Moll team up with a young girl and her trusty flashlight to find the culprit. Following a trail of crumbs and using a school bell as a lure, they discover the 'Pool Noodle Nibbler' is actually Roberta the Skunk, who has been eating the foam out of hunger and loneliness. Realizing Roberta is simply misunderstood, the group invites her to join Bert's birthday party, a grand celebration filled with music, skunk friends, and cupcakes, turning a neighborhood mystery into a night of new friendships.

title: Voyage to the Kingdom of the Sea Mice
summary: A submersible carries a crew of familiar friends and adventurous explorers deep into the ocean's depths. Their mission: to reach the legendary Kingdom of the Sea Mice. Along the way, they navigate past the sunlit upper waters into the cold, dark abyss, encountering a grumpy, sleepy anglerfish and spotting mysterious sea stuff through the portholes. With new captains taking the helm and cats joining the crew, the voyage becomes a discovery of the unknown wonders of the deep.

title: Gonk-a-Bona and the Soup-Seeking Mole
summary: Mickey and Minnie finish a delightful lunch and follow a mysterious humming sound outside to find their friend Mole. Mole has just returned from the grocery store with an eclectic list of soup ingredients, including jalapeños, gouda cheese, and kale. The friends retreat to their shared family house for playtime with trucks before discovering the sleepy Uncle Bill. They show off a magnificent, multi-functional robot named Gonk-a-Bona, which can transform into a lion and travel from the depths of the ocean to the far reaches of outer space. The adventure concludes as the friends settle down to sleep under a canopy of homemade stars.

title: The Chronicles of Carland and the Sea Mice
summary: The saga begins in the crushing depths of the ocean, where the explorer Sansango Cantasa reaches the seabed to find the elusive Sea Cat. In the world above the floor, a vast community of seamice—featured in a library of specialized books—contemplates building a grand ocean castle while avoiding deep-sea sharks. As the mysterious presence of Carland draws near, the narrative shifts into a world of artistic creation. Creatures of all kinds, from butterfly-hedgehogs to silver-star owls and dinosaurs that look like snowflakes, emerge as vibrant paper figures. In this whimsical realm, a seamouse might find itself gifted with a tiny hat, while others navigate the festivities behind the guise of a fox mask.

title: Peacock’s Castle and the Neighborhood Photo Project
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole join Izzy the photographer on a journey to the hilltop castle of Peacock the Wizard. Welcomed by the elephant gatekeeper Phillyfoo and guided by Zinna the giraffe, the group explains their mission: a neighborhood photo project for Silver’s third birthday. After photographing the wizard in his cozy fireplace armchair, the team ventures into the forest to capture portraits of their neighbors. They meet Victor the mouse getting dressed after a nap, Hoo-Hoo the owl drying off from a shower, a messy-maned zebra, a camera-shy monkey in a tree, and a dancing elephant named Don-Don. Even the lightning-fast bird Vroom-Vroom can't escape Izzy's lens, ensuring the birthday wall project is a success.

title: Captain Izzy's Galactic School Bus Mission
summary: Embark on a cosmic journey as Captain Izzy and her eclectic crew blast off from Earth to explore the stars. After receiving a strange message from the Planet of the Tiny Fuzzballs, the crew learns the aliens need a lift to their new school. The mission grows more complex when baby angler fishes call out for rescue, prompting the crew to build specialized rocket-houses. From navigating neon sidewalks with high-speed moving machines to translating alien languages, the crew works together to complete their galactic errands and ensure everyone finds their way home.

title: Mission to the Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole join Captain Izzy on a daring interstellar mission to reunite a baby space rock named Moueks with its family. After blasting off from Earth with a cargo of essentials like flashlights and dinosaurs, the crew navigates the deep dark of space. They successfully rescue Moueks' father using a robotic arm and set a course for the vibrant Rainbow Planet Vupiter Wupiter Snupiter. Guided by a magical rope to ensure their return, they navigate through swirling colorful clouds to deliver the space rock family home before safely touching down back on Earth.

title: The Glowing Expedition for Mole
summary: Mole has gone missing in the dark forest after wandering too far in search of a worm snack. Mickey, Minnie, and their friend Jane set out on an expedition to find him, guided by a mysterious glow and armed with lanterns. Along the way, they discover a secret robot and its clumsy sister robot, who join the search. Using advanced robot hearing to track Mole's signature humming, the team navigates the woods to rescue their furry friend and bring everyone safely home before bedtime.

title: Captain Izzy's Martian Mission
summary: Captain Izzy and her crew blast off into the stars on a daring mission to visit their friend Julian on Mars. While navigating the cosmos, they encounter mysterious space cats and a cluster of sentient space rocks. Using the ship's robotic arm, Izzy retrieves the rocks and places them in a special purple box to keep them warm. However, the rocks begin to cry, revealing their need for companionship. As the mission progresses, the explorers must carefully test the ship's systems and navigate toward the attic—the ship's highest deck—all while ensuring they don't wake the sleeping Avery.

title: Captain Izzy's Space Boat Launch
summary: A captain prepares her crew for a daring expedition into the cosmos. Inside the high-tech space boat, every piece of technology must be perfectly calibrated, from the captain's chair to the essential sound machines, ensuring a safe and rhythmic journey through the stars.

title: Mission to the Astro-Orange Restaurant
summary: Captain Izzy leads a daring space mission originally destined for the Astro-Mar-Orange Astro Restaurant. Accompanied by her crew, Kenzi and Lieutenant Finncat, the journey takes an unexpected turn when the ship must pull over for emergency repairs to its tables, walls, and floors. Using specialized tools like the center-comp-ul-tree and an art-per-puller, the crew restores the ship to full functionality. While the destination shifts toward Nana’s house, the crew stays entertained with mechanical 'play books' and a watchful robot camera. The mission finally concludes as the crew transitions from the stars back to Earth for music class and a visit to Ttia's house.

title: The Magic Forest Photo Tour
summary: On a special Picture Day in the Magic Forest, Hattie the Mouse and Izzy the Kiddo team up to capture portraits of their magical neighbors. Their journey takes them from Hattie's hollow tree workshop to the heights of the Wizard's Castle to visit Peacock the Wizard. Guided by a series of detailed maps, the photography team travels through jungles, over mountains, and past the mysterious Lions Stool to reach the colorful homes of Mischief Mouse and Dr. Victor, ensuring everyone in the forest gets their moment in the spotlight.

title: Hattie and the Celestial Shooting Star
summary: Hattie the Mouse embarks on a celestial adventure after meeting a shooting star named Vijaya and a sparkly bird named Badasta. Together, they soar across the night sky, experiencing the thrill of flight before landing safely back at Hattie’s cozy tree house. Exhausted from their journey, the trio skips their snack and settles in for a peaceful nap.

title: The Workout Wombats and the Deep Blue Sea
summary: In a world where the deep blue sea meets a rising forest fire, the Workout Wombats prepare for a grand adventure. Clad in their unique gear, they navigate a realm filled with scorpions and monsters lurking in the depths. Under the light of the stars, they dance and sing across a land of unexpected wonders and aquatic dangers.

title: Mission to the Taco Space Station
summary: A daring spaceship mission ventures into the far reaches of space. Chief Engineer Isabella leads a crew—including a brave fox and bear assistants Mercury and Nercury—as they navigate shipboard fires, orbital maneuvers, and medical emergencies. The mission takes a tasty turn when they discover a floating space station that spells out "TACOS" on its sensors. After docking to enjoy square and triangle-shaped delicacies, the crew continues their deep-space exploration, eventually encountering the mysterious Mama Ship and its captain. Through mechanical repairs and first-aid rescues, the crew proves that no problem is too "long" to solve.

title: Blast Off to the Hundred Acre Wood
summary: The crew of a space pirate ship prepares for an ambitious mission to the Hundred Acre Wood. As they journey through the stars, chief engineer Isabella must tackle a series of technical crises, from broken engines and jumbled 'emotional' computers to a malfunctioning 'Morza' switch on the ship's piano. Along the way, they fend off space rocks with lasers, repair dents caused by a rogue beaver, and consult with specialists like Dit Darnet and Mr. Offises. After a long flight navigated with mysterious cards and gems, the ship makes a gentle landing in a grassy clearing right outside Christopher Robin’s house.

title: Hattie's Giant Robot and the Rainbow Gnome Hat
summary: Hattie the mouse is a master builder who thrives on creative projects. After surprising her friends Mickey, Minnie, and Mole with a massive, building-sized metal robot in a forest clearing, she moves on to her next creation: a multi-colored cardboard hat designed for all three friends to share. To perfect her masterpiece, Hattie travels to the Mousey Grocery Store to find the ideal purple gnome sticker. Her journey showcases her ingenuity as she balances engineering giant machines with the delicate art of hat-making.

title: The Putt-Putt Road Trip Adventure
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole finish a picnic in Mole’s flower-filled yard and decide to go exploring in the deep forest. They pile into Mole’s small, noisy brown car and set off on a road trip. After realizing they forgot snacks, they stop at Mischief Mouse’s store to stock up on cheese and ants. Their journey is interrupted by a heavy traffic jam, but they pass the time by visiting Red Mouse's unique toy store, which is built entirely of wooden blocks. After purchasing magnetiles and a dress-up doll, they return to their car, wait for the green light, and zoom off once the road is clear.

title: A Shell Hat and Jingle Bells
summary: When Juliesta the yellow-furred mouse is found crying in the local treehouse, her friends Mickey, Minnie, and Mole race to Hattie the mouse for assistance. They decide to craft a unique orange and pink cardboard hat, decorated with a shell and a yellow feather, to cheer her up. After a daring journey through the treetops to deliver the gift, they find Juliesta asleep. Upon waking her with a song, the group learns that her tears weren't for a lack of a hat, but due to a case of stage fright before a big show.

title: Minnie Mouse and the Long-Legged Lego Duck
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole visit Nana Mole's house, which sits at the edge of a vast field of wildflowers. While relaxing on the porch with hibiscus tea, Mole introduces his friends to a bag of magic Legos that can turn into real objects for a short time. Using the magic word 'Aska-baska-noona-maska,' Mickey transforms a Lego flower into a real, fragrant blossom. Minnie then constructs an exceptionally tall Lego duck and brings it to life with the incantation 'Up-sa-fra.' Despite its clumsy, long legs, the real duck runs at incredible speeds through the flower fields before finally returning to its Lego form.

title: The Silver Kitten's Snuggle Emergency
summary: Silver the kitten experiences an urgent "snuggle emergency" and wanders through her house in search of the perfect cuddle. After receiving a brief, gentle snuggle from Jane, her quest leads her past a busy Finncat in the kitchen and a sleepy rainbow snake in the sunroom. Following the sound of footsteps upstairs, she finds comfort in Mama's lap before moving on to Isabella's room. There, Silver finally receives the most cozy and gentle embrace of all, allowing her to drift off into a peaceful sleep.

title: Finn the Cat's Arctic Rainbow Quest
summary: Finn the cat embarks on a journey to the frozen Arctic to retrieve a rainbow ball lost by Shamberine the mouse. Dressed in a cozy purple wool hat knitted by Hatty, Finn travels alongside his friends Jane the cat and Isabella. After trekking across mountains and lakes, they arrive at the Castle of the Mouse Family, where they enjoy a feast of Arctic ice cheese. To find the treasure, they enlist the help of the tall Christmas mice, waking them with a festive song. Despite accidentally disturbing a hibernating weasel, the group eventually discovers the vibrant rainbow ball buried beneath the snow behind the castle. Victorious, they carry the ball back to the warmth of the south, completing their grand expedition.

title: The Great Expedition of the Sas-ma-ras-ma-fla-mas Frog
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole borrow a magical boat from the Princess of Mouseland and embark on an adventure to a remote island with a towering mountain. After several comedic false starts that require sailing home for water and Wheat Thins, the trio finally prepares a massive picnic and returns to the island. They trek through a dense jungle filled with butterflies and follow Cindy-Wan the Frog-a-loza to a fresh stream. There, they meet a giant, colorful bird named Lasra-bird who flies them to the mountain's peak. On the summit, they encounter a rare Sas-ma-ras-ma-fla-mas frog and discover a mysterious mushroom that smells like bacon. Following a successful picnic and a nap, the companions fly back to their boat and sail home just in time for bed.

title: The Rocket Boat to Mouseland
summary: Best friends Mickey, Minnie, and Mole set off on an epic voyage after borrowing a magnificent vessel from the Princess of Mouseland. To earn the boat, they must first assist the Princess in her royal duty of naming various cheeses for her mouse subjects. Once they set sail, they discover a mysterious 'ZOOM' button that transforms their sailboat into a high-speed rocket ship. After a thrilling, water-spraying dash across the ocean, the friends manage to engage an emergency stop button just in time, landing safely beside a beautiful tropical island with a towering central mountain.

title: Frasgle and the Sticky Situation
summary: When Mickey, Minnie, and Mole encounter a mysterious, multi-colored creature named Frasgle in the forest, they find him in a very sticky situation. After accidentally napping under a sappy pine tree, Frasgle's beautiful fur is matted with gooey pine sap. The group of friends attempts everything from brushing to licking to shaking, but the sap won't budge. After learning how to communicate love to one another, they decide to take Frasgle to a local pond. Despite being nervous about the cold water, Frasgle takes the plunge, successfully washing away the sap and celebrating his cleanliness with his new friends before they all head home.

title: Mickey, Minnie, and Mole's Galactic Bake-Off
summary: Mickey, Minnie, and their hungry friend Mole set out to bake blueberry and banana treats, but their quest for ingredients takes them from a messy grocery store run to the far reaches of the galaxy. Aided by Jickity Jickity Giraffe and his fast race car, the trio eventually boards a spaceship to visit Mischief Mouse, the King of a royal castle orbiting Jupiter. After navigating past a giant sentient space rock, they deliver a glowing gift to the King before returning home to Earth for a well-earned rest.

title: The Underground Library and the Big Bubble Bonanza
summary: Mole, Mickey Mouse, and Minnie Mouse go on an adventure to find a new book, leading them to a magical Underground Library hidden beneath an old tree stump. There, they meet Mischief Mouse, the librarian, who helps them check out 'The Big Bubble Bonanza'. Within the book's pages, they learn about Wibble the giraffe, who overcomes the challenges of his great height to buy bubble soap and craft a star-shaped bubble wand from clay, branches, and playdough. The story concludes with Wibble successfully blowing colorful bubbles that sparkle in the sunlight above the forest.

title: Hattie's Magic Mouse Summoning
summary: Hattie the mouse discovers that the whimsical words she invents are actually powerful magic spells. By chanting 'Baskamadasca,' she accidentally summons her friend Mischief Mouse from a roof-patching job and later calls upon the giant Pinecone Mouse. When the group faces a mysterious problem, the Super Sleuths—Darby, Pooh, and Tigger—zip in on their scooters to investigate. They quickly deduce that the real issue is a collective case of the rumbles, leading to a grand feast of honey and cheese at Pooh Bear's house.

title: Hattie and the Mystery of the Muddy Mountain
summary: While foraging for hat-making materials in the forest, Hattie the Mouse hears a cry for help and discovers her friend Mischief Mouse is trapped inside a mountain. After navigating through secret entrances and dark, muddy tunnels, Hattie finds Mischief stuck in a deep patch of mud. Using water from a nearby underground stream to wash the mud away, Hattie successfully rescues her friend. The pair collects some underground mushrooms and escapes back into the sunlight, eventually heading home for a much-needed rest.

title: Hattie's Grand Playhouse Construction
summary: Hattie the mouse hears a strange digging sound and discovers Jengia the Digger building a brand new playhouse in her backyard. The construction project proceeds through several careful steps, including the addition of a bench, a door, walls, and colorful curtains. When the group reaches the final challenge of placing the heavy roof, they call upon Lily, the tallest mouse in the world, to help them finish the job and complete Hattie's new home.

title: Mischief Mouse and the Tiny Lego Hat
summary: Mischief Mouse returns to Hattie’s workshop because her custom Lego hat is broken and missing pieces. The two friends work diligently to rebuild the headpiece block by block, stacking many Legos together. However, when the project is finished, the hat is far too small and falls off Mischief's head. To manage her frustration, Mischief takes a deep breath and counts to four before explaining the problem. Undeterred, Hattie decides to dismantle the small hat and rebuild it even larger to ensure the perfect fit.

title: Hattie's Rainy Day Birthday Adventure
summary: On a rainy morning, Hattie the Mouse and her friend Mischief set out on a rainy adventure after a breakfast of bacon and pancakes. Clad in raincoats and galoshes, they navigate puddles and mud, befriending Wesley the Worm and a helpful digger named Whopper along the way. Whopper helps smooth a road for them, and they continue to a shop on Cornell Street to buy a sparkly orange purse for Mistress Mouse. The journey ends with a joyous third birthday celebration for Mistress Mouse, complete with chocolate cake and the presentation of her perfect gift.

title: Hattie the Mouse's Custom Hat Shop
summary: Hattie the Mouse is busy in her workshop crafting custom hats for all her friends. From a little orange cardboard hat with sparkly mouse stickers for Jame to a sparkly silver hat for Silver Cat, Hattie meticulously measures and paints every creation. When she runs out of feathers for Jane’s special request, she must visit the supermarket to find the perfect rainbow feathers, glitter, and even a fishy pond to complete the most colorful hat of all.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Poet Worm
summary: On a rainy morning on Mouse Street, Hattie the Mouse enjoys toast and hibiscus tea while a thunderstorm keeps her indoors. To pass the time, she draws a mysterious picture with a black marker. Hearing a strange sound outside, she discovers a worm squelching through the mud. The worm is working on a poem about muck and asks Hattie for help with rhymes. After brainstorming words like 'yuck' and 'buck' and finishing their special project, the two friends head home for a peaceful afternoon nap.

title: Zilliam's Brick Bed and the Story of Nothing
summary: Zilliam the Robot finds himself tipping over until Uncle Bill helps him balance by adding Lego bricks to his arm. Despite his exhaustion, Zilliam insists he isn't tired, even as he lets out giant robot yawns. Finally settling onto his brick bed, he listens to Uncle Bill's shortest story ever—a tale about absolutely nothing—before drifting off to sleep.

title: The LED Robot and the Honey Tree of Cornell Street
summary: A hungry bear named Winnie the Pooh meets a crying baby robot made of electronics and LEDs. They team up to find a beehive on Cornell Street, using Pooh's ladder to reach a pot of honey. After sharing a sweet snack, they travel to the robot's colorful metal home, where the baby robot is reunited with her mama and dada robot.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Backyard Cleanup
summary: Hattie the mouse discovers that her beautiful backyard is overflowing with an assortment of junk just as the spring blossoms begin to appear. Expecting a visit from her Nana, Peter Rabbit, Hattie decides it is time to tidy up. When Nana arrives on Sunday, the two survey the mess—which includes everything from old electronics and toys to bricks and even "boogies." Armed with bags and shovels, Hattie and Nana Peter Rabbit work together to scoop up the clutter and haul it all to the trash, leaving the yard pristine and ready for the season.

title: Hattie the Mouse's One-Step-at-a-Time Bedtime
summary: Hattie the Mouse has a new baby sister, which means bedtime is a little bit different than it used to be. Hattie decides to take her nighttime routine one step at a time. After playing with Legos, putting on her shirt, and donning a handmade hat, she settles in to read 'The Mystery Cozy Witch'—a story about getting comfortable on a rug with a bug.
