Following a sweet lullaby from her mama and the activation of her special squeaker machine, Hattie tucks herself into her crib with a blanket and a sleep sack for a long night of rest.

title: Hattie's Block-Built Nature Walk Adventure
summary: When a rainy day thwarts Hattie the Mouse's plans for an outdoor nature walk, she turns to her Nana for comfort. With her mother away at the hospital tending to a new baby, Hattie and Nana transform their home into a vibrant landscape using only blocks. Their imaginary journey brings them face-to-face with squirrels, dandelions, and fantastical creatures like a striped horse in glasses and an elephant by the sea. This charming adventure proves that even the grayest day can be brightened with a little creativity and a handful of blocks.

title: Hattie Mouse and the Big Sister Surprise
summary: Hattie Mouse is overjoyed to welcome her new baby sister, Avery, into the family home. To prepare for the big arrival, Hattie organizes everything a baby could need, from bottles and bassinets to tiny outfits and toys. Once Avery arrives, the family settles into a cozy routine of feedings, naps, and bath times. Together, they share a warm meal, read books about how babies grow and crawl, and end their perfect day with snuggles and songs as they welcome their newest member into their loving home.

title: The Tale of the Talking Gluten-Free Broccoli
summary: Hattie the mouse visits Minnie and Mickey Mouse at their home, where they discover a very unusual surprise in their refrigerator: a talking piece of broccoli! Because the broccoli doesn't want to be eaten, the friends decide to have a dinner of apples and chicken nuggets instead. In a surprising twist, the broccoli joins them at the table and requests a pear for its own meal. After a busy evening of feeding the pet kittens and getting plenty of rest, the group spends the next day playing games and singing together.

title: Haddy the Mouse and the Lego Airplane
summary: When young Izzy the Kiddo finds herself stuck in bed with a cold, her friend Haddy the Mouse pays a visit to cheer her up. Rejecting soup in favor of creativity, the pair dives into a world of building blocks. Joined by a Lego architect named Uncle Bill, they construct elaborate symmetrical stairs and a soaring airplane, proving that a little imagination is the best medicine for any illness.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Rainy Day Stove Rescue
summary: When Hattie the Mouse finds her stove broken on a rainy day, she calls upon her Nana, a bunny named Peter Rabbit, for assistance. Peter Rabbit visits over the weekend and discovers the cause of the problem: a spoon had fallen behind the appliance. Once the stove is fixed and plugged back in, the two celebrate their success by preparing a feast of pasta and a fresh garden salad.

title: Stretching Before the Story
summary: In the moments before the nightly 'Stars and Story' ritual, a young girl decides that her physical fitness comes first. Insisting on finishing her special exercise routine before beginning the evening's tales, she demonstrates a strong sense of priority and determination while her audience waits patiently.

title: Hattie and the Lego Aquarium Adventure
summary: Hattie the mouse and her friends Clownfish and Splownfish decide to build a grand Lego aquarium in the living room while waiting for their hot stew to cool down. The aquarium becomes a bustling home for an anglerfish and ten other uniquely named fishes. After Hattie joins them for a swim, the whole group boards a musical trolley for an excursion to the mousey playground. Following a day of play, everyone returns home to put on their pajamas and drift off to sleep to a gentle lullaby.

title: Pakruder Worm's New Sound
summary: Hattie the Mouse discovers a tiny worm named Pakruder outside her workshop who is struggling to find her own unique sound. Because the worm can only squeak like a mouse, Hattie takes her on a journey to a large house filled with mice friends to brainstorm ideas. After testing out several whimsical sounds like 'squamp-zam-zim' and 'bamp-pa-deo,' the group finally discovers the perfect sound: 'bam-a-lamp-sam!' The friends celebrate by building a massive Lego ice cream tower and sharing a nap before heading home for the night.

title: Hattie Mouse and the Mouse Street Doctors
summary: Hattie the mouse is busy crafting a hat in her workshop when she accidentally injures her paw with scissors. Needing medical attention, she travels down Cornell Street and Mouse Street to visit Dr. Lily Mousey. Assisted by Nurse JJ Mouse and Tia Mouse at the front desk, the doctor cleans and bandages Hattie's wound. Reassured that she will be okay, Hattie returns home to finish building a funnel for her magnificent marble run. After a satisfying dinner of rice, she sings herself a lullaby and drifts off to sleep, ending her long and productive day.

title: Hattie's Magical Rainbow Tape Quest
summary: Hattie the mouse leaves her workshop on a quest for magical rainbow tape to use in her hat-making. Her journey leads her to a shop on Poplar and Popcornioni Street, where Mischief Mouse directs her toward Pepperoni Street. Along the way, Hattie survives a squelchy encounter with a mud puddle, getting a much-needed cleaning from her neighbors Bert and Ernie. Upon reaching her destination, she discovers a wondrous store decorated with a red tape parrot. Guided by a clerk named Lily, Hattie finds the rainbow tape hidden in the vegetable aisle and returns home successful.

title: The Mystery of the Snake Store Bups
summary: Hattie the mouse is walking through town when she visits the curious Snake Store, which sells a unique type of lollipop known as 'bups.' While choosing a flavor, Hattie runs into her friend Mischief and Mischief's mother, who works as the store's cashier. Hattie chooses a chocolate bup while Mischief picks vanilla. The two friends head to the local park to enjoy the swing set and play together. Their fun is interrupted by a sudden rainstorm, prompting the pair to hurry back to Hattie's nearby house for shelter.

title: Hattie the Artist Mouse
summary: Hattie the Mouse, a dedicated hatter, decides to explore a new hobby: painting. When she finds the local art store on Popcorn Street completely empty of supplies, she follows a winding path to a unique shop run by Minnie Mouse that stocks everything from fresh vegetables to rainbow-colored paints. After gathering an easel, a medium canvas, and a green brush, Hattie returns to her workshop to create a vivid masterpiece featuring an indigo witch in a violet hat and a speedy red bird. Content with her work, the artistic mouse finally heads home for a well-earned nap.

title: The Anglerfish and the Hairy Drawing
summary: Hatty the Mouse and her friend Izzy the Kiddo spend a whimsical day drawing portraits that span from the sunny poolside to the deep, dark sea where anglerfish glow. Joined by Christopher Robin, Pooh-bear, and a cast of artistic friends like Piglet and Mischief, the group explores a gallery of "hairy drawings" and ever-changing sketches. Their art transforms from lantern fish into swings and walks with mom. As the stars emerge, the friends admire each other's work one last time before waving goodbye and returning home for their well-earned naps.

title: Hattie's Shell Necklace Adventure
summary: At three in the morning, Hattie the Mouse and her many friends—including Mrs. Strawberry, Victor, and Habattaly—wake up at Hattie's house for a day of play. After a hearty breakfast, the group sets out on a walk through a sunlit field to a nearby pond. At the water's edge, they discover a collection of unique shells and decide to string them together into a beautiful necklace, which Lily eventually wears. Their journey continues deep into a quiet, cool forest and eventually leads them to a majestic canyon, where a gentle stream flows between steep rocky cliffs.

title: Hattie's Indigo Mushroom Adventure
summary: Hattie the Mouse and her friend Izzy the Kiddo set off on an adventure to find rare indigo and violet mushrooms for Izzy’s hat. After discovering Hattie's workshop only carries common colors, they hitch a ride with Who the Owl to the corner of Cornell and Poplar Streets. Guided by Uncle X the Owl, they find their way to the Bistrom Store, a unique shop run by a tall, multicolored bear named Cod. After successfully acquiring the rare mushrooms, Izzy decorates her hat and creates a special card for her Nana before heading home to rest after her long expedition.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Starry Hats
summary: Hattie the mouse is interrupted in her workshop late at night by a group of cold forest creatures—baby raccoons, foxes, and owls—who are in desperate need of hats. While Hattie has mushrooms, glue, and paper, she is missing the essential twinkling star stickers to finish the job. After a journey to Mama Fox’s burrow to secure the stickers, Hattie crafts beautiful hats for every animal. Once the work is done, Hattie overcomes a case of the 'can't-fall-asleep blues' by following her nightly bedtime routine and finally settles in for a peaceful rest.

title: Hattie's Masterpiece: The Elephant Who Could Chirp
summary: In the colorful world of Hattie the Mouse, creativity knows no bounds. Now a grown-up 'painter man,' Hattie embarks on a messy artistic journey to create a book about Melly, an elephant who dreams of chirping like a bird. Despite being told that elephants only have trunks and not tweets, Melly and her vibrant group of friends—including the indigo-striped Julian and the blue Jelly—discover the power of friendship and finding one's own voice. Featuring glitter, stripes, and the mysterious Caribbean Amphibian, this is a heartwarming tale of how even the largest animals can find a small, beautiful sound of their own.

title: Hattie's Rain Boots and the Honey Bee's Hat
summary: On a rainy day, Hattie the mouse dons her red jacket and orange-and-yellow boots to travel to the grocery store. Joined by Mistress Mouse in a pink tow truck, they collect celery and pomegranates. When the weather clears the following day, Hattie teams up with Winnie the Pooh to find fresh honey. By carefully listening to the sounds of the forest, they track a bee across a stream and over a hill to its hive in a flower bush. After the bee shares its golden honey, Hattie kindly crafts a tiny, matching yellow-and-brown flower hat for their new insect friend.

title: Hattie and the Tower of Traffic Cones
summary: Hattie the Mouse is enjoying a quiet lunch in her tree-stump workshop when she is visited by Mischief Mouse and a massive group of orange traffic cones with unique names. The cones spend their afternoon running circles around the workshop and dancing to the 'Caribbean Amphibian' song. Under the guidance of Mischief Mouse, the cones learn how to stack themselves into an incredibly tall tower. As the day ends, the cones hop down and magically transform into flowers, teddy bears, and carrots before finally heading home.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Rainbow Mushroom Mystery
summary: After finishing a book about forest animals, a new adventure begins with Hattie the Mouse, who discovers her workshop is out of essential red clay mushrooms for making hats. Accompanied by her friends Mischief Mouse and Mistress Mouse, she sets off in a tow truck toward the grocery store. Their journey takes an unexpected turn when they encounter Goldbug, a friend stranded with a broken engine and a missing wheel. After a successful roadside rescue, the group reaches a grocery store overflowing with mushrooms in every color imaginable. Hattie gathers her supplies and returns to her hollow tree workshop, mission accomplished.

title: A Hat for Mistress Mouse
summary: In her busy workshop, Hattie the Mouse receives a specific request from Mistress Mouse for a unique cardboard hat featuring green stripes, pretend red mushrooms, and colorful beads. Hattie carefully measures and assembles the pieces, dealing with frustration and small mistakes along the way by practicing deep breathing. After the hat is baked, painted, and decorated, Mistress Mouse proudly visits her mother, Mischief, to show off the finished masterpiece, and the two enjoy a peaceful meal of corn together.

title: Hattie the Mouse's Hat Workshop
summary: Hattie the Mouse is a skilled hat-maker who operates a bustling workshop filled with materials like feathers, paper, and cardboard. Her friend Victor visits to find a new hat but is unsure which style suits him best. Hattie showcases a range of options, from tiny red caps to towering yellow feather hats that nearly hit the ceiling. Victor eventually chooses a large blue cardboard hat adorned with elephant stamps, which perfectly matches his jacket. He loves the design so much that he returns to request a second identical hat, leading Hattie to craft a custom blue-on-blue masterpiece using special star, moon, and sun stamps.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Baby Chipmunk's Snack
summary: Hattie the mouse is a talented artist and craftsman who welcomes various visitors to her workshop, from hat-seeking robots to portrait-loving monkeys. On a rainy day, Hattie's plans for a walk are nearly ruined until she visits the local shop next door to buy a pink rain jacket and galoshes. Now prepared for the weather, she heads to the playground to splash in puddles. During her play, she discovers a hungry baby chipmunk in need of help. Hattie's kindness shines as she guides the little one to a snack area for a delicious meal of apples and yogurt, ending her rainy day adventure on a high note.

title: The Imaginary Road Trip to Nana's House
summary: Peacock the Wizard leads a colorful group of friends on a grand quest to visit Nana in the world of imagination. Piling into a purple and pink car with blue stripes, the team travels past veggie stores and taco shops, enjoying snacks like chocolate chip and fried veggie tacos. Their journey ends at Nana’s cozy house, where they reunite with family and pets before drifting off to sleep after a reading of their favorite bedtime story. In a smaller tale, Oscar Mouse finds the perfect tiny home inside a sugar can in a dark cupboard.

title: The Big Muck Problem: One Pile at a Time
summary: When Bert and Ernie’s neighborhood becomes overwhelmed by spring junk and a massive mud puddle, a clever young visitor named Izzy shares her Nana’s wisdom: tackle problems 'one at a time.' Joining forces with a hard-hat-wearing Minnie Mouse and her powerful yellow digger, the friends embark on a mission to clean up everything from the garden to the sidewalk. From fixing holes in the street to finding books on the moon, it’s a mucky adventure that proves no problem is too big when you have good friends and a bit of patience.

title: Hattie the Mouse and the Massive Shopping List
summary: Hattie the Mouse runs a specialized hat workshop inside the Hollow Tree, where she crafts unique headwear for her neighbors. Her day begins with a visit from Mischief Mouse, who orders a multi-colored hat that Hattie surprisingly finishes by baking it in her oven. The quiet day is quickly interrupted by Victor Mouse, who arrives with a massive wish list including everything from mittens and sneakers to thermometers and bedroom curtains. Realizing she only makes hats, Hattie kindly offers to close her shop and drive Victor to a local store so he can fulfill his enormous shopping list.

title: Daisy's Tiny Dog Birthday Adventure
summary: Bluey needs help preparing a massive birthday feast for her friend Daisy, a tiny dog who is turning five years old. Enlisting the help of Izzy the Kiddo, they search through a magical Lego bin for flower treats and bananas before heading to the grocery store to stock up on crunchy, chocolate-flavored soda and an assortment of fruits and vegetables. After a quick trip through the checkout line, they decorate the house with fire trucks and prepare for a house full of friends, including Queso, Bingo, and the rest of the pack. With a five-candle cake and a chorus of barks, the party celebrates Daisy's big day in style.

title: The Foxy Way and the Twirling Ghost
summary: Peacock the Wizard attempts to recruit Izzy for a magical quest to find hat parts for Hattie the Mouse. However, Izzy is far too busy playing a unique and complex game at Hattie's Workshop of Hats with her friends. Eschewing the adventure, the Wizard joins the group to learn the rules of a game involving foxy ghosts, penguin steps, and elusive directions. Under the guidance of a singing Robot Mommy, the friends learn that while some find it hard to be a fox, everyone can find their own unique way to share—even if it's just twirling.

title: Hattie and the Wizard's Clover Show
summary: In her cozy workshop, Hattie the Mouse discovers two sparkling green clover stickers. Her day takes an exciting turn when she receives a formal invitation to a grand performance at Peacock the Wizard’s castle. Traveling through the forest and over the hills, Hattie joins her friends Mischief Mouse, Mistress Mouse, Lily Mouse, and Jasper for a night of wonder. The show features talented kiddos who enchant the audience with songs like 'Baby Beluga' and high-energy dances in colorful costumes with wings. After a magical evening at the castle, Hattie returns home to drift off to sleep.

title: Haddy the Mouse and the Sparkly Bissolam
summary: Haddy the Mouse embarks on a creative journey to make a magnificent piece of sparkly art, complete with jingle bells and balloons, for her friends Victor, Mr. Slinger, and Lily. As she prepares for the Bissolam—a joyful day of dancing and music—Haddy visits her baby sister, Oscar Mouse, and several other tiny friends at the hospital's baby lounge. When Oscar finally returns home, she finds herself missing the crackers and colors of the lounge. Haddy comforts her with songs and the promise of home-made drawings, eventually singing her baby sister into a peaceful sleep.

title: Victor's Muddy Mishap
summary: While sharing tea and Cheez-Its in Hattie the Mouse's workshop, friends hear a cry for help coming from outside the hollow tree. They discover Victor, a tiny mouse trapped in a thick coating of mud, twigs, and stones. With the advice of a wise Fox, they prepare a bath for the messy traveler. After Izzy sings a comforting rendition of "Baby Beluga" to calm Victor's nerves, he finally jumps into the tub, emerges sparkling clean, and enjoys the warmth of a fresh towel.

title: Hattie's Workshop: Puzzles and Purple Hats
summary: Hattie the Mouse, a dedicated hatmaker living on Possible Street, encounters a problem when her favorite brown cardboard puzzle develops a mysterious hole. With the help of her neighbor Mistress Mouse and a vibrant yellow-and-orange striped screwdriver, the duo manages to repair the puzzle using an unexpected solution: metal screws. Their teamwork quickly transitions from puzzle-fixing to hat-making when Mr. Swinger calls with a specific request for a purple and green cardboard hat. Using brushes, paint, glue, paper trim, and a special unicorn sticker, the two mice craft a masterpiece and deliver it to Lily's school, leaving their customer delighted with his new accessory.

title: The Wizard's Play-Doh Hat Quest
summary: Izzy the Kiddo embarks on a magical quest to find a new hat for Peacock the Wizard. Accompanied by Fincat's Mouse, she ventures into the deep dark forest where she meets a hungry Fox. After preparing a creative breakfast of flowers and orange juice, the Fox points her toward Haddy the Mouse, a master hat maker who has been cursed and turned into a mushroom. Using her magic wand and a clever rhyme, Izzy restores Haddy to his mouse form. In gratitude, Haddy crafts a vibrant blue, pink, and purple Play-Doh hat, which Izzy presents to the delighted wizard back at the hilltop castle.

title: Tigger's Quest for the Wizard's Magic Wand
summary: Tigger and Christopher Robin set out on an adventure to reach the Wizard’s castle, hoping to receive a magic wand. Along the way, they overcome a towering wall with a clever stack of items and brave a dark, friendly forest inhabited by singing birds and curious insects. Upon arriving at the magnificent stone castle, they are greeted by a Queen and reunite with their friend Eeyore. They climb a long, winding staircase to meet Peacock the Wizard—a pink and yellow bird—who teaches them the art of rhyming magic. Entrusted with a magical wand, the group prepares for a new quest to find the Wizard's lost hat before heading back into the night.

title: Oscar Mouse and the Musical Wolf Cub
summary: Oscar Mouse awakens in his cozy stone wall home at the onset of spring. After meeting a bird named Mischief, the two set out to find a breakfast of pretend berries scattered on the street. Their journey takes a heroic turn when they encounter a pack of wolves searching for their lost cub, Cubby Chickendoll. Despite the wolves suggesting they fly to search, Oscar and Mischief use their feet to track the cub to a peculiar music shop called Yestalam, which sells both instruments and vegetables. They find the tiny cub hiding under a violin and safely return him to his family. After helping several other friends repair their broken belongings with glue, Oscar and Mischief return to their burrow to snuggle up for a well-earned rest.

title: Stars and Stories: Piglet's Birthday Surprise
summary: Piglet wants to make Eeyore's birthday special by giving him a bright red balloon. After getting it inflated by Christopher Robin, Piglet accidentally trips and pops the gift. Undeterred, he returns home to find a special gold balloon that is resistant to popping. When he finds Christopher Robin is out fishing, Piglet and Winnie the Pooh wait patiently for his return. Once the gold balloon is finally inflated, Piglet carefully delivers it to Eeyore at the stream, giving the donkey a wonderful surprise that he ties to his tail to enjoy all day long.

title: Izzy the Kiddo and the Quest for the Deep Sea Pearl
summary: After receiving a special star-projecting light at home, Izzy the Kiddo visits the JP Library and discovers an adventure book about Pout-Pout Fish, Bert, and Ernie. Using her trusty flashlight, Izzy leads her companions into the 'deep, deep dark' of the ocean floor. They encounter a distressed Ms. Clam who has lost her precious pearl and is unable to sleep. The team bravely dives into a deep trench, recovers the pearl from the mud, and returns it to its owner, allowing the sea creatures to finally rest.

title: Mickey and Minnie's Interstellar Forest Adventure
summary: Mickey and Minnie Mouse embark on a cosmic journey across the galaxy in their colorful, multi-toned spaceship. After blasting off from Earth and navigating past planets like Jupiter and Saturn, they reach a distant star system. There, they discover a lush green planet covered in forests and meet a friendly resident named Oscar Mouse. Following a garden-fresh snack of carrots, tea, and cucumber, the trio spends time building a Lego sun and singing together before Mickey and Minnie make the long voyage back home to Earth.

title: Expedition to the Deep-Deep Dark
summary: A group of unusual friends, including Willa the Worry-Worry Whale, Pout-Pout Fish, Bert, and Ernie, travel from the ocean to a diner on Sesame Street for a massive breakfast. Joined by other friends like Cookie Monster and Little Bird, they dine on everything from bacon and eggs to tiny specks of pepper and a single grain of salt. Following their meal, they embark on a brave expedition led by Izzy the Kiddo and her magical flashlight. Their journey takes them through a slimy kelp forest and down a deep trench to the Deep-Deep Dark. Along the way, they recruit a crab, a purple octopus, and a clam who needs to be carried. The team works together to find the clam's lost pearl in the dark mud before returning home for a nap. Later, the focus shifts to Mischief Mouse, who meticulously constructs a tall Lego tower on a green base, only to experience the joy of smashing it to pieces.

title: Mistress Mouse and the Construction Site Race
summary: Mistress Mouse is the hero of the mouse world, whether she's dominating the racetrack or rescuing friends in need. In a high-stakes race around a busy construction site, she outmaneuvers Victor Mouse and his bananamobile, navigating around a massive steamroller to take the lead. Her skills are put to the test again when a group of friends, including Oscar and Alfie, drive too fast and find themselves stuck in a deep mud puddle. With her trusty pink tow truck and a powerful tow hitch, Mistress Mouse pulls every car to safety, proving that no mud puddle is too deep for her to handle.

title: Mistress Mouse and the Pink Tow Truck Rescue
summary: Mistress Mouse and her trusty pink tow truck are the ultimate heroes on wheels. When a family of pigs gets their car stuck in a muddy mixture of leaves and acorns, Mistress Mouse arrives to pull them out. To celebrate, the pig family hosts a grand dinner where Mistress Mouse is honored with a massive Lego tower built by Penny and Pickles—a tower so tall it eventually goes 'kaboom!' Later, the adventure continues as Mistress Mouse helps Mischief Mouse, whose own tow truck has broken down. Their shared journey leads to a celebratory spaghetti feast and a heartwarming surprise: a coloring book featuring a very sleepy sloth. From muddy fields to cozy homes, Mistress Mouse proves that a helping hand can lead to new friends and great memories.

title: Mistress Mouse and the Great Penguin Car Race
summary: Mistress Mouse receives an urgent phone call: the big race is today! After a quick snack of dried apples and water, she jumps into her race car and heads to the starting line at the finish line. Facing off against Mischief Mouse in a borrowed tow truck and Mama Mouse in a medium-sized black and black car filled with books about junk, the racers speed through hills, dense jungles, and a treacherous construction site filled with bulldozers and cranes. Just as they hit the final leg, a surprise entrant, Daddy Mouse, takes the lead in a two-wheeled orange penguin car. However, in a final burst of speed, Mistress Mouse crosses the finish line first to claim victory in a stunning race with a surprise ending.

title: The Many Adventures of Mistress Mouse
summary: Mistress Mouse is a resourceful mechanic and racer always ready for a new challenge. From using her tow truck to rescue Olivia Mouse’s car to building sprawling Lego towns with her friend Lily, she is a pillar of her community. Her adventures take her on a sunny vacation to the museums of Mexicota and onto the race track, where she pilots her custom five-wheeled purple car to victory against a fleet of tow trucks and a school bus. Even a broken merry-go-round at the amusement park is no match for her skills, as she uses a hammer to dislodge a stray nut bar and save the day. Whether she's racing through the jungle or fixing rides, Mistress Mouse is the hero of every story.

title: The Adventures of Surprise Mouse and Friends
summary: Surprise Mouse and Plotty Mouse wake up and head to the store for a vegetable-buying mission. After purchasing carrots and broccoli and returning home for a spaghetti dinner, the friends are joined by Mischief Mouse for a long car ride. They pass the time listening to Frog and Toad stories and singing mouse songs before finally arriving at Nana Mouse's house, which is filled with an endless supply of toys to play with.

title: The Lego Adventures of Mistress Mouse and Other Mouse
summary: Mistress Mouse decides to skip a day of adventure to stay at home, parking her little pink truck in the garage. She spends her afternoon building Lego structures for her stuffy friends—Mickey, Oscar, and Elfie—before enjoying a massive feast of Indian food, guacamole, and chips. After reading a bedtime story, she falls asleep to a gentle lullaby, waking up the next day to play in her yard. Meanwhile, Other Mouse enjoys a peaceful day building with Legos, showing resilience by rebuilding a funny tower after it falls and sharing his success with his friend Mickey Mouse.

title: Spooky Pooky's Handmade Gifts
summary: When Spooky Pooky the pig finds his favorite bookcase broken, his mother Mama Pooky steps in to fix it. Grateful for her help, Spooky Pooky crafts a special brown and white bead necklace for her. Later, the pair realizes they have forgotten a gift for their friend Raccoon's birthday party. They quickly return home to handmade beautiful pink paper lanterns. The story concludes with a joyful celebration where the Pooky family shares their handmade gifts, sings Happy Birthday, and enjoys cake with all their friends.

title: Pistis and Potty Mouse's Sprinkle Adventure
summary: Pistis Mouse stays home with Nana while his parents go to the store, spending his time building a complex Lego workplace where mice can learn computer programming. Later, Potty the Mouse embarks on a grand adventure in a miniature toy car, traveling to a specialty store to procure glittering pink sprinkles. Together with his tiny friends, he returns home to bake an array of creative cookies shaped like cats, stars, and radios, even inviting a father mouse to join in the kitchen fun.

title: The Tail of Two Mice: Surprise and Hoodie
summary: In a series of tiny adventures, Surprise Mouse lives in a fabric house within a larger human home. One morning, she finds a pile of leaves and decides to create a complex leaf picture. With help from her parents, she completes her masterpiece of a bus driving through the leaves. Elsewhere, Hoodie the Mouse enjoys a feast of tomato soup, crackers, meatballs, and spaghetti. After cleaning up his meal, he gathers twigs and feathers to build a cozy nest for a long, restful sleep.

title: Tiggy, Riggy, and the Rainbow Fish
summary: In a series of imaginative tales, several small mice embark on grand adventures. Tiggy the Mouse celebrates Christmas by gifting a leaf and a rock to his friend Pliggy, followed by a cozy breakfast of vegetable soup. Meanwhile, the duo Jiggy and Riggy journey across the ocean with the help of Hootie the Owl, discovering an island playground and conquering mountains together. Another mouse named Booty spends his evening building a magnificent Magnatile mansion for his many toys. Finally, beneath the waves, the Rainbow Fish discovers that true happiness comes from sharing his shimmering beauty with others, proving that generosity is the most valuable treasure of all.

title: The Chronicles of Pinecone Mouse and the Pink Tow Truck
summary: Pinecone Mouse and her friends, Plotty, Mischief, and Mistress, enjoy a feast of vegetable soup and go for a walk in the woods to find a special stick. Later, Mistress Mouse takes her pink tow truck on a long journey through the city to the cake store. Equipped with crayons, snacks, and a purple CD of Sesame Street songs, she returns home to decorate a cake and settle in for a night of rest with her family.

title: The Name Game with Mrs. Rabbit
summary: The search for the perfect name for a new baby sister leads to a musical celebration of the name Avery. While the name is joyfully sung and practiced, the family's resident naming consultant, Mrs. Rabbit, remains hilariously unimpressed with the choice.

title: The Chugga-Chugga Journey to Nana's House
summary: A persistent train embarks on a long, adventurous journey across the countryside. Along the way, it chugs through a pitch-black tunnel and traverses a high bridge before finally arriving at its destination: Nana's house. A joyful family reunion ensues with Nana, Grampa Rick, Andrew, and Uncle Steve. However, the pets Garfield and Ginger have other plans, choosing to retreat into a closet to hide away with their favorite fish and mouse toys.
